title: Kanjuro Reveals His Strange Power
description: Pages 6–10 focus on kanjuro reveals his strange power, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as kinemon reunites with Kanjuro beneath Dressrosa while the allies search for ways up the plateau and toward Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Decapitation High Heel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Longleg just got taken out!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oi, now's not the time for sightseeing, straw hat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This whole bird cage game is a farce!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even if we take down all you "convicts," none of us are safe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Once news of his secret arms trading and the whole toy business get out,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're all pretty much done for!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo will stop at nothing to prevent that information from leaking!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sitting around waiting for a miracle is simply going to get everyone killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pressing forward and taking Dofla- Mingo's head is the only way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We will get off this island alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Doflamingo is always one step ahead of everyone else...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But he's made a critical error in judgment.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: He's brought together, in his colosseum,

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Every single super- human weirdo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: On these seven seas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We shall not lose!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Because, above all else,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I will be the one to take Dofla- Mingo's head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: What the hell are you babbling on about!? I'm gonna be the one to beat Mingo to a pulp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Well then mine is 30 years old!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I thought I told you he's mine, straw hat- ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I appre- Ciate your offers, but I will be the one to take him down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Oi, soldier Guy! Didn't you just say that

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You wanted us to save you one of his executives!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: That's a personal matter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I must be the one to return his majesty's kingdom to him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I have a 10-year-old debt to repay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: If we're gonna talk about time, then Lemme tell ya, mine is 13 years old!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Stop pulling facts our of your ass, you idiot! There's no way you were even born that long ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Straw Haaaaaa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: All of you, get off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You get off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Let's just put this aside for the time being...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: We've made it! This is the third level!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Awe..some! Now let's just haul ass straight through to the 4th level! Go horsey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Short snort

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Clatter

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: What the heck are these giant puppets?!

summary: Kanjuro Reveals His Strange Power develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
